seoTitle: Clematis vs Clifton Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clematis and Clifton Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clematis vs Clifton Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clematis and Clifton Hill.
heading: Clematis vs Clifton Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clematis, Victoria and Clifton Hill, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clifton Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Clematis (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clematis or Clifton Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clematis has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Clifton Hill scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clematis scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Clifton Hill scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clematis or Clifton Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clifton Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
